conference.info_text: The instant conference can only be started by you. Anyone can join the conference using the conference information.

Your recent list is empty.

main.title: Video Conference
main.nameRequest: You can start a meeting immediately by entering a name and click on start meeting button. Or you can create a meeting and share the meeting information with other participants by copying the meeting information into Mail, calendar invitation, etc.
